summary: There was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for ibuprofen on 2023-08-02, with 143 reports exceeding the expected count of 40.42.
notable_pattern: Reports from patients taking multiple medications, including immunosuppressants and other pain relievers, were more common during this time period.
confidence_caveat: This is an exploratory signal from a limited sample of 8 reports and should not be considered a clinical conclusion.
